'''âk-z-th''' ('''kakazath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:netsplit|netsplit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:netsplit|netsplit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-z-th
|-
! Lemma
| kakazath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikazath|thikazath]] || [[word:jikazath|jikazath]] || [[word:shikazath|shikazath]] || [[word:kikazath|kikazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukazath|thuthukazath]] || [[word:jujukazath|jujukazath]] || [[word:shushukazath|shushukazath]] || [[word:kukukazath|kukukazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukazath|thukazath]] || [[word:jukazath|jukazath]] || [[word:shukazath|shukazath]] || [[word:kukazath|kukazath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukazath|thukazath]] || [[word:jukazath|jukazath]] || [[word:shukazath|shukazath]] || [[word:kukazath|kukazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekazath|thekazath]] || [[word:jekazath|jekazath]] || [[word:shekazath|shekazath]] || [[word:kekazath|kekazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokazath|thothokazath]] || [[word:jojokazath|jojokazath]] || [[word:shoshokazath|shoshokazath]] || [[word:kokokazath|kokokazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokazath|thokazath]] || [[word:jokazath|jokazath]] || [[word:shokazath|shokazath]] || [[word:kokazath|kokazath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokazath|thokazath]] || [[word:jokazath|jokazath]] || [[word:shokazath|shokazath]] || [[word:kokazath|kokazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkazath|thĂŠkazath]] || [[word:jĂŠkazath|jĂŠkazath]] || [[word:shĂŠkazath|shĂŠkazath]] || [[word:kĂŠkazath|kĂŠkazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakazath|thathakazath]] || [[word:jajakazath|jajakazath]] || [[word:shashakazath|shashakazath]] || [[word:kakakazath|kakakazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakazath|thakazath]] || [[word:jakazath|jakazath]] || [[word:shakazath|shakazath]] || [[word:kakazath|kakazath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakazath|thakazath]] || [[word:jakazath|jakazath]] || [[word:shakazath|shakazath]] || [[word:kakazath|kakazath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakazath|shakazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakazath|goshakazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakazath|gokishakazath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakazathnĂŒ|shakazathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakazathnknĂŒ|goshakazathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazathnĂŒ|gokishakazathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakazathshĂ«|shakazathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakazathnkshĂ«|goshakazathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakazathshĂ«|gokishakazathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazathro|shakazathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazathnkro|goshakazathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazathro|gokishakazathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazathmu|shakazathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazathnkmu|goshakazathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazathmu|gokishakazathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakazathsher|shakazathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakazathnksher|goshakazathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakazathsher|gokishakazathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakazathng|shakazathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakazathnkng|goshakazathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakazathng|gokishakazathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakazathya|shakazathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakazathnkya|goshakazathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakazathya|gokishakazathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakazathyam|shakazathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakazathnkyam|goshakazathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakazathyam|gokishakazathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazathnĂŒshĂ«|shakazathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakazathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakazathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazathnĂŒro|shakazathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazathnknĂŒro|goshakazathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazathnĂŒro|gokishakazathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazathnĂŒmu|shakazathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazathnknĂŒmu|goshakazathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazathnĂŒmu|gokishakazathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazathshĂ«nĂŒ|shakazathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakazathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakazathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazathshĂ«ro|shakazathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazathnkshĂ«ro|goshakazathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazathshĂ«ro|gokishakazathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazathshĂ«mu|shakazathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazathnkshĂ«mu|goshakazathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazathshĂ«mu|gokishakazathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazathronĂŒ|shakazathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazathnkronĂŒ|goshakazathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazathronĂŒ|gokishakazathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazathroshĂ«|shakazathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazathnkroshĂ«|goshakazathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazathroshĂ«|gokishakazathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakazathromu|shakazathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakazathnkromu|goshakazathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakazathromu|gokishakazathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakazathmunĂŒ|shakazathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakazathnkmunĂŒ|goshakazathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakazathmunĂŒ|gokishakazathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakazathmushĂ«|shakazathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakazathnkmushĂ«|goshakazathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakazathmushĂ«|gokishakazathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakazathmuro|shakazathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakazathnkmuro|goshakazathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakazathmuro|gokishakazathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
